name: agentspec_resolve
description: Resolve an agent manifest against the current environment. Detects available runtimes, matches model preferences, maps skills to tools, builds system prompt.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');from agentspec.parser.manifest import AgentManifest;from agentspec.resolver.resolver import resolve;d=json.load(sys.stdin);m=AgentManifest(**d['manifest']);p=resolve(m,verbose=True);print(json.dumps(p.to_dict()))
